description: Self-improvement waves for the 340B executive dashboard. Prompts upgrade themselves; each wave can add up to ultra_prompt_wave_size prompts and rules_per_wave rules (see config.json).

waves.name: Data Integrity
prompts: Ensure folder structure config/, data/, analytics/, ui/, docs/.
Validate STATE_340B vs STATE_NAMES; log and surface validation warnings.
Keep dataset-metadata.js in sync with state-data.js (lastUpdated, version).
Display About Data panel with provenance, timestamp, methodology, download link.

waves.name: Metrics & Insights
prompts: Add year-over-year trends, policy adoption timeline, national benchmarks.
Add executive summary panel: key figures upfront ($7.95B, 72 PA hospitals).
Ensure POLICY_INSIGHTS and applyPolicyInsights() feed the national strip.
Document metric definitions for CEO readability.

waves.name: UX/UI & Design
prompts: State filter dropdown synced with filter buttons; ranked state table by year.
Interactive map with hover tooltips and state highlights.
Responsive design; professional palette and typography; smooth transitions.
Executive overview section with key findings upfront.

waves.name: Interactivity
prompts: Implement hover tooltips, filters, ranked tables.
Add map and chart interactivity.
Ensure responsiveness across devices.

waves.name: Security
prompts: Sanitize all dynamic content; safe JSON and link parsing.
Perform XSS and injection checks.
Ensure safe external links (rel=noopener noreferrer).

waves.name: Performance & Optimization
prompts: Optimize DOM manipulations and caching.
Refactor code for readability; reduce memory and load time.
Lazy-load components as needed.

waves.name: Self-Improvement
prompts: Read ultra_prompts.json and execute upgrades.
Generate new prompts per wave; run daily cycles when config.daily_update is true.
Track versioning and logs in data/archive/.

waves.name: Documentation
prompts: Update OPERATIONS_MANUAL.md automatically.
Add inline comments and labeling for maintainers.
Generate README.md updates.

waves.name: Cross-Agent Validation
prompts: Compare all agent proposals; resolve conflicts using weighted scoring.
Approve or reject changes; log rejected for learning.

waves.name: Executive Experience Audit
prompts: Simulate executive dashboard use.
Score clarity, polish, and decision-readiness.
Suggest refinements for final presentation.
